case_title: NESTLE LAPENA et al VS. NHAT MINH VO et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-15-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFENDANT ANN THI NGOC WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00 SERVED JUL-22-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VO, NHAT MINH DBA (VO'S RESTAURANT)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ANH THI NGOC BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-15-2013 AT 8:30 AM.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $179.25 FILED BY LAPENA, NESTLE DBA (CASA VINEDO) BORTOLAMI, JEROME DBA (CASA VINEDO) AS TO DEFENDANT VO, NHAT MINH DBA (VO'S RESTAURANT) NGOC, ANH THI DBA (VO'S RESTAURANT) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAPENA, NESTLE DBA (CASA VINEDO) BORTOLAMI, JEROME DBA (CASA VINEDO) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VO, NHAT MINH DBA (VO'S RESTAURANT) $179.25 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $254.25, DEFENDANT NHAT MINH VO WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE. CASE IS DISMISSED W/PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANH THI NGOC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
